case.title: PRATT v. DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY

opinion.h4: PRATT v. DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY, (1958)
PRATT v. DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA CIRCUIT. No. 455, Misc. Decided March 31, 1958.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Rankin, Assistant Attorney General Doub and Samuel D. Slade for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed.
STRONG v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF MASSACHUSETTS. No. 456, Misc. Decided March 31, 1958.
Solicitor General Rankin, Assistant Attorney General Doub, Paul A. Sweeney and Herman Marcuse for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed.
